nasb.text: A jealous and avenging God is the Lord; The Lord is avenging and wrathful. The Lord takes vengeance on His adversaries, And He reserves wrath for His enemies.

esv.text: The Lord is a jealous and avenging God; the Lord is avenging and wrathful; the Lord takes vengeance on his adversaries and keeps wrath for his enemies.

cnv.text: 耶和華是嫉惡和施行報復的　神； 耶和華施行報復，並且滿懷烈怒； 耶和華向他的對頭施行報復， 向他的仇敵懷怒。

ccb.text: 耶和华是痛恨不贞、施行报应的上帝。 耶和华施行报应，充满烈怒。 耶和华报应祂的仇敌，向他们发烈怒。
